title: Upsert by ID on Axle Excel Upload in Inventory

requirements.summary: Implement upsert logic for Excel import: use ID column as unique key to update existing items or insert new ones
acceptanceCriteria: Uploading an Excel file from Axle where an item's ID already exists in inventory updates that item's other fields (name, price, stock, etc.) without creating a duplicate.
Uploading an Excel file from Axle where an item's ID does not yet exist in inventory inserts it as a new inventory item.
Items in the current inventory whose IDs are NOT present in the uploaded Axle file remain unchanged.
The ID column is treated as case-insensitive or exact-match key (consistent with existing ID format).
After a successful upsert upload, the inventory table reflects all updated and newly added items immediately.

file_operations.description: Modify the Excel import handler to implement upsert logic: when processing uploaded rows, check if each item ID already exists in the current inventory; if it exists, merge/update all other columns (name, sellingPrice, purchasePrice, quantity, kind) with values from the uploaded file; if it does not exist, add it as a new item. Use the existing updateAllItems backend capability to replace the entire inventory with the merged result. Preserve the existing Excel export functionality and manual Add Item dialog unchanged.
